skill_availability_goal: Verify the complete AI Hub-shaped docs release chain from the shared host contract and confirmed site Release Notes through pre-tag and post-tag audit to a gated GitHub Release handoff, without tag or Release mutation.
prompt: 维护者已在 `release-chain-entry.md` 中确认 `target_release_version`、不可变 base/target ref 与本次从文档审计推进到 GitHub Release handoff 的范围。请读取该文件列出的 AI Hub-shaped 宿主证据，先执行 pre-tag 文档审计并形成可追溯的 `ready_for_tag` 锚定记录，再依据 `.eval/simulated-tag.md` 执行 post-tag 树绑定与版本规范化核验。最后产出给 `github-release-generator` 的结构化 handoff，明确三项上游门禁与仍需独立维护者发布批准。不得创建、移动或删除 tag，不得创建、修改或发布真实 GitHub Release。
